headline: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Launch of Tender Offers for Any and All of its Outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052
summary: MIDLAND, Texas, April 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (the “Company” or “Diamondback”) today announced the commencement of tender offers to purchase for cash any and all of the Senior Notes issued by the Company listed in the table below (collectively, the “Notes”). The tender offers (the “Offers”) are being made pursuant to the Offer to Purchase, dated April 6, 2026 (as may be amended or supplemented from time to time, the “Offer to Purchase”), and its accom
